title: Devdas
tmdbOverview: In 1900s India, Calcuttan zamindar Devdas Mukherjee — unable to marry his lover — takes up alcohol and the company of a courtesan to alleviate the pain.
synopsis: Released in 2002, Devdas is a drama and romance film from India. It holds a solid 7.5 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 0 certification (CH rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
